features.name: genvar declaration inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a genvar declaration placed inside a generate block, not outside it

features.name: named begin block inside generate
features.description: Code should include a named begin block (begin : label) used inside a generate construct
features.snippet:
generate
  for (int i=0; i<8; i++)
  begin : loop_label
  end
endgenerate
